{{Quote|The High Council of the Jedi Order is on Coruscant, but we are the Council in charge of the training facility here on Dantooine.|Zhar Lestin|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
The '''Dantooine Jedi Enclave Council''' was the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Council]] in charge of the [[Jedi Enclave]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. The governance of the training facility was conferred to this body sometime after the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], when the first overseer and the founder of the [[Jedi academy]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Vodo-Siosk Baas]], died at the hands of his former apprentice [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]].

This Council was a subset of the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]; Jedi Masters such as [[Vrook Lamar]] and [[Vandar Tokare]] held a seat on both councils during the [[Mandalorian Wars]] and the [[Jedi Civil War]]. It comprised four Jedi Masters and went through many membership changes in its history. Other than [[Jedi training/Legends|Jedi training]], it was responsible for the administration of the Enclave and the supervision of other academy councils throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. One such example is the [[Jedi_Council/Legends#Taris|Tarisian Jedi Council]] which operated the [[Jedi Tower]] on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]].

Many of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] trained under this Council would become historically influential figures, most notably [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], who was a famed [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] and hero of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], and later [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]], before his mind was destroyed and he was trained once again as a Jedi to battle his own [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]].

==Members of the Council==
[[File:Dantooinecouncil.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Members of the Council speak with [[Bastila Shan]] in a meeting chamber of the Jedi Enclave.]]

At the time of the [[Great Hunt (Jedi)|Great Hunt]], the Council consisted of Jedi Masters [[Vrook Lamar]], [[Bala Nisi]], [[Qual]], and [[Aleco Stusea]]. When Jedi [[Shaela Nuur]], [[Duron Qel-Droma]], and [[Guun Han Saresh]] arrived at the Enclave, the Councilors had strong reservations regarding the Hunt; Lamar was wary of sending a Qel-Droma near any site known for it's dark energy, because of his [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|cousin's]] fall to the dark side. Nisi argued that three Jedi was not enough to send on such a high-stakes mission; while Qual and Stusea thought they should trust in the High Council's decisions to send the trio.

At the time of the [[Mandalorian Wars]], the group had changed slightly; Qual and Stusea had been replaced with [[Zhar Lestin]], a notable Jedi instructor from Coruscant, and the wise and venerable Master [[Vandar Tokare]]. The Council would attempt to work with the nearby [[First WatchCircle|Jedi Council]] on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]; though after the [[Padawan Massacre]], the Enclave Council recommended the Taris Council be withdrawn back to Coruscant.

As the [[Jedi Civil War]] broke out, Master Nisi had been replaced by [[Jedi historian]] [[Dorak]]. This Council would oversee the reconditioning of the amnesic [[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan]], and train him to overthrow the remaining [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] legions. This would be the final formal Council of Dantooine, for [[Darth Malak]] would destroy the Enclave via [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbital bombardment]].

After the end of the Civil War, three surviving Jedi returned to Dantooine to pass judgment one final time on the [[Exile (punishment)/Legends|Jedi Exile]] [[Meetra Surik]]. Master Lamar, [[Zez-Kai Ell]], and [[Kavar]] would attempt to strip the exiled Jedi of the Force, only to have the act performed on them by [[Kreia|Darth Traya]]. Being stripped of the Force, the last of the Council died, the august body dissolved permanently.
